title: Turn-up Book
overview: Huey arrives at his late grandfather's estate to discover a young girl among his grandfather's library. Dalian and him are invited to the Conrad estate to find everyone to be slaughtered and the estate to be in shambles.

title: Book of Fetus
overview: Huey's grandfather was commissioned to appraise books of the late grandfather of Estella Lilbarn, however, they soon discover that a string of mysterious murders have been occurring on the estate.

title: Book of Wisdom / Queen of the Night
overview: There is once again more trouble with a phantom book, but it seems that this time will be a lot different from the usual "trouble".

title: Book of Soul Exchange
overview: Huey and Dalian have received a letter asking them to save an old friend of Huey's deceased grandfather from a mysterious book.

title: The Magician's Daughter
overview: This time Huey doesn't receive a request to destroy a book, but he is asked to lend one, what is this all about?

title: Libricide
overview: We follow the characters of Hal and Fem as they investigate a strange town that was devastated by the war. Everything seems too  lively for a city that should be in ruin.

title: Parfumer
overview: Huey and Dalian meet a strange perfumer who creates perfumes with the knowledge of a phantom book.

title: Book of Equivalence / Book of Relationship
overview: Huey’s friends get in all sorts of trouble with Phantom Books.

title: Book of Twilight
overview: Some Insects are attacking the village, but hopefully Dalian and Huey are there to rescue the habitants of this world.

title: Phantom Score
overview: Huey and Dalian meet an odd lady who plays the violin like no other and the sound of her work makes everyone around her happy. But the song she plays turn out to be a phantom score.

title: Bibliotheca Razielis Archangeli
overview: We take a look at the past to understand the life of Huey before he met Dalian.

title: Song for the Unwritten Future
overview: Zombies are running around in London, it is time for Huey and Dalian to figure out who is playing with the undead and to stop them permanently.
